Notice Of Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jul-08-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel the attendance of defendant Francisca Tapia at deposition is ordered off calendar. Neither the motion nor the declaration state facts showing a reasonable and good faith attempt at an informal resolution. The parties are ordered to meet and confer to schedule the deposition at a mutually convenient time and place. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
